plot outline: 'Nemo Nobody' is recounting his life story to a reporter. He's less than clear, often times thinking that he is 34 years of age, others, well over 100. But his story becomes more confusing after he does focus on the fact of his current real age.
title: Mr. Nobody
akas: Ein Mann, drei Leben - Mr. Nobody (Germany)
Las vidas posibles de Mr. Nobody (Spain)
